sglang.title: Remve router gemm output dtype conversion
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Since #7825, we need to keep the output of dsv3 router gemm as float32. So the additional dtype conversion can be removed.

sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
mm token id is necessary for calculating the mm offsets
When corresponding mm token id is not given, the error would be very strange and hard to address.

sglang.title: [AMD] Remove vllm's scaled_fp8_quant and moe_sum when SGLANG_USE_AITER=1
sglang.author: hubertlu-tw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is part of the efforts to remove vllm's dependency on ROCm.
The vLLM's scaled_fp8_quant and moe_sum will be replaced with the aiter's counterparts when SGLANG_USE_AITER=1

vllm.title: [Docs] Fix hardcoded links in docs
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
If left as explicit HTML links, they are almost guaranteed to break when new docs versions are released and pages are moved/renamed.
Using proper MD links:

Ensures that the resulting HTML link links within the same docs version
Allows users browsing the MD (locally or on GitHub to click through the

vllm.title: [Docs] Make tables more space efficient in `supported_models.md`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reduces the min width of table headers so that the columns that only contain green tick emojis take up less horizontal space.
This leaves more horizontal space for the other columns leading to less wrapping and less vertical space consumed by the table.

vllm.title: [perf] Speed up align sum kernels
vllm.author: hj-mistral
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Move fill ops inside align sum kernel to reduce bubbles.
cumsum buffer does not need to be filled with zero.
we can use blockscan to do the prefix sum

This PR also moves the triton inits into the kernel to make it a fair comparison and also ensure the kernel is usable in the future as a fa

vllm.title: [v1][sampler] Inplace logprobs comparison to get the token rank
vllm.author: houseroad
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary: Original implementation is inefficient, since we will create a copy of the original tensor. So create a triton kernel to get this done in place.
Test Plan
Launch the server with warm up requests
Before:
OOM
After:
No more OOM
Differential Revision: D78606604

vllm.title: Fix kv_cache_dtype handling for out-of-tree HPU plugin
vllm.author: kzawora-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt: PR #21131 removed HPU checks for --kv-cache-dtype flag, and now HPU out-of-tree plugin (https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-gaudi) is unable to use KV cache quantization with INC due to NotImplementedError: VLLM_USE_V1=1 is not supported with --kv-cache-dtype.. This PR adds a check for out-of-tree

vllm.title: [Misc] DeepEPHighThroughtput - Enable Inductor pass
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
DeepEPHighThroughput All2All kernels + Torch Inductor pass yielded incorrect results for deepseek-v2-lite models. The Inductor pass was disabled as a result. This PR enables it again as we don't see any issues now.
Test Plan

server command : VLLM_ALL2ALL_BACKEND="deepep_high_throu
